prompt_text:
### Demographics: 66-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 14 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after ophthalmology referral for suspected retinopathy
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class III)
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Major Depressive Disorder
Orthopedic fracture (healed)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older sister)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 82.9 kg; Height 164.9 cm; BMI 30.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 130/73 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 6.6%; 9 months ago 6.9%; 6 months ago 6.7%; 3 months ago 6.2%; current 5.7%), FPG (12 months ago 161mg/dL; 9 months ago 161mg/dL; 6 months ago 173mg/dL; 3 months ago 152mg/dL; current 129mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 82.8kg; 9 months ago 83.1kg; 6 months ago 80.7kg; 3 months ago 82.9kg; current 82.9kg), Height (12 months ago 164.9cm; 9 months ago 164.9cm; 6 months ago 164.9cm; 3 months ago 164.9cm; current 164.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 30.0kg/m²; current 30.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 126mmHg; 9 months ago 128mmHg; 6 months ago 132mmHg; 3 months ago 128mmHg; current 130mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 72mmHg; 9 months ago 71mmHg; 6 months ago 73mmHg; 3 months ago 75mmHg; current 73mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 16U/L; 9 months ago 17U/L; 6 months ago 16U/L; 3 months ago 13U/L; current 19U/L), AST (12 months ago 15U/L; 9 months ago 14U/L; 6 months ago 20U/L; 3 months ago 19U/L; current 16U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.7mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 24mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 26mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 21mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 22mL/min/1.73m²; current 21mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 454mg/g; 9 months ago 464mg/g; 6 months ago 448mg/g; 3 months ago 434mg/g; current 384mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 88mg/dL; 9 months ago 84mg/dL; 6 months ago 87mg/dL; 3 months ago 83mg/dL; current 85mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 36mg/dL; 9 months ago 36mg/dL; 6 months ago 36mg/dL; 3 months ago 36mg/dL; current 37mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 130mg/dL; 9 months ago 127mg/dL; 6 months ago 110mg/dL; 3 months ago 113mg/dL; current 119mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.2g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 11.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
